# standby.design

> Small tools for designers and developers.
> https://standby.design

## Tools

### OKLCH Palette Generator
- URL: https://standby.design/color
- Purpose: Generate perceptually uniform color palettes in the OKLCH color space
- Output formats: CSS Custom Properties, Tailwind v4 config, Design Tokens (JSON), Fontshare embed code
- Features: Primitive & semantic tokens, shadow generation, light/dark/high-contrast modes, shadcn/ui compatible
- Use case: Designers and developers building accessible, perceptually uniform color systems for web apps

### Type Scale Generator
- URL: https://standby.design/type
- Purpose: Generate fluid typographic scales using mathematical ratios and clamp()
- Output formats: CSS Custom Properties, Tailwind v4 config, Design Tokens (JSON), Fontshare embed code
- Features: Golden ratio / custom ratio / traditional scales, fluid clamp() values, responsive mobile scales, spacing scale, live Fontshare font preview
- Use case: Designers and developers building consistent, responsive type hierarchies

## How to use the generated code

Both tools export production-ready code in four formats:

1. **CSS Custom Properties** — Copy into any global CSS file. Framework-agnostic. Works everywhere.
   Example: `var(--text-h1)`, `var(--color-brand-500)`, `var(--space-md)`

2. **Tailwind v4** — Paste into your `@theme` block in Tailwind CSS v4.
   Maps tokens to Tailwind utilities like `text-h1`, `bg-brand-500`, `gap-md`.

3. **Design Tokens (JSON)** — W3C Design Tokens Community Group format with `$type` and `$value`.
   Import into Figma, Style Dictionary, or any token pipeline.

4. **Fontshare Embed** — `<link>` tag to load the selected fonts from Fontshare CDN.

## Recommended ratio

The Type Scale Generator defaults to a ratio near sqrt(phi) ~ 1.272. Historical type scales (Renaissance to modern) and natural proportions cluster around this value. It is a recommendation, not a strict rule — values in the range of roughly 1.2 to 1.35 produce harmonious typographic hierarchies.

## Technical details

- Color space: OKLCH (perceptually uniform lightness, chroma, hue)
- Typography: fluid sizing via CSS clamp() with viewport-based interpolation
- Spacing: derived from the typographic scale for visual consistency
- All values are unitless rem-based and respect user font-size preferences
